description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light tan brick exterior, white-framed windows, and a prominent chimney. The front facade features lush green ivy climbing up the walls, decorative lantern-style lights, and a small fenced-in garden with colorful flowers. A driveway leads to a carport adjacent to the house, separated by a white picket fence. The backyard is spacious, enclosed by a brick wall, and includes a well-maintained lawn, a greenhouse, and a wooden pergola surrounded by dense shrubbery and garden beds. The roof is a mix of gable and flat sections, with some areas covered in light blue metal sheeting and others in traditional shingles. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic Colonial Revival style, blending traditional elements with modern landscaping.
description: A two-story tan brick house with white windows, ivy, a picket fence, and a lush backyard featuring a greenhouse and pergola. The design is classic and suburban, with a mix of gable and flat roofs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with ivy, white-framed windows, lantern lights, a flower garden, and a driveway with a carport behind a white picket fence.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the brick wall of the house, the driveway, and the full extent of the backyard with a greenhouse and garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the backyard, including the greenhouse, pergola, and dense landscaping, as well as the back of the house with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the brick wall, the side of the house with additional windows, and the backyard's garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical garden-facing windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a white door, decorative lantern lights, a small porch with steps, and a white picket fence with a gate.
